content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size(6) ∧ devops_part_time(true) ∧ timeline("4months") ∧ data_store("PostgreSQL")
H: modest_traffic ∧ faster_development ∧ simplified_deployment ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: build_core_logic → integrate_billing_later → ensure_modular_design
R: ! potential_scaling_issues ∧ ! tight_timelines ∧ ! dependency_complexity
A: start_with_a_modular_design ∧ prioritize_core_functionality

[AUDIT]
Decision aligns with team capacity and timeline.

structured_data.audit: Decision aligns with team capacity and timeline.
